title: Configurable project, change, assessment, and process workflows
acceptance: Versioned workflow definitions and event-sourced instances support four built-in presets and custom allowlisted guards.
Existing six SDLC phases and assessment two-checkpoint behavior remain backward compatible.
Configuration overlays are pinned, explainable, governed, and cannot rewrite active workflow history.
